changelog.change: Fix a crash when you try to connect with a blank host setting.
Now defaults the "Connect Automatically" setting to true when first added to a layout.
A link to the settings guide has been added to the top of the settings editor.
You can now configure the filename for best segment replays.
You can now add a delay before best segment replays are saved.
You can now save replays for segments that are within a specified distance of the corresponding best segment.
If you have auto-connect enabled, it will now start connecting as soon as LiveSplit loads the component settings.
Connection settings will no longer be flagged as invalid before the component settings editor is opened.
Replay files should no longer fail to rename on occasion.
Replays will only be saved for best segments that span a single named segment.
The debug log is now hidden by default. A checkbox is available to show it.
